---
title: "Talks"
description: "Talks, seminars, and presentations."
---

## Selected talks

Add your talks here in reverse chronological order.

::: {.publication}
### Talk title
**Venue**, City, Country — Year  
Short description of the talk.

[Slides](#) · [Video](#)
:::

::: {.publication}
### Seminar title
**Institution / Seminar Series** — Year  
Short description of the seminar.

[Slides](#)
:::

## Invited lectures and seminars

- Add seminar 1.
- Add seminar 2.
- Add conference talk 1.
